candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue line; matches total revenue concept directly and is the most specific non-total label.
Also matches top-line revenue, but is a total/subtotal duplicate of Revenue, so lower priority.
This is a cost line, not revenue.
Non-operating/special item income, not top-line revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement revenue.

candidates.row_label: Prepayments received from customers and deferred revenue
candidates.why: Liability/deferred revenue balance sheet line, not recognized revenue.

variables.notes: Using Revenue as primary choice, with Total Revenue as fallback priority label for years where labeling may vary. They are duplicates, not to be summed.

candidates.why: Direct production/service costs tied to revenue; best match for cost of sales/COGS.

variables.notes: Direct costs line clearly represents COGS/cost of sales.

candidates.why: Personnel overhead component; appropriate SG&A component.
Likely administrative/other operating overhead component; appropriate SG&A component.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal appears. Selected the best overhead component rows and excluded direct costs, D&A, amortization, special items, and finance items. No separate R&D row is visible.
No dedicated research and development row is present in the income statement preview.

candidates.why: Net/aggregate finance cost line, but underlying components exist so it is less preferred.
Primary recurring interest cost line; best core match for XINT.
Recurring lease-related interest component; should be included with interest expense.
Recurring finance-cost bucket; acceptable to include when granular components are otherwise incomplete, excluding FX/fair value items listed separately.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest already captured by the main statement line; avoid double counting.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance cost components over total Financial expenses. Excluded Exchange Losses and Fair Value Adjustments as non-interest/non-recurring valuation-type items. Excluded supplemental lease-interest row to avoid double counting with the main income statement line.

candidates.why: This is a comprehensive income allocation line on the income statement, not balance sheet equity.
Best match for book equity attributable to shareholders; preferable to Total Equity when no non-controlling interests line is shown.
Valid total equity line, but less preferred than Shareholders' Equity - Total because BE should exclude NCI when possible.
Shareholder count, not equity value.
Balancing item, not a substantive reported equity line.
Balancing item, not a substantive reported equity line.
Total balance sheet total, not book equity.

variables.notes: Using Shareholders' Equity - Total as primary owner-equity line. Total Equity included as fallback priority label only. No non-controlling interests line is visible, so MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
No minority interest/non-controlling interests line is present in the balance sheet preview.
